hero.tagline: Everything you need for a smooth arrival: access, Wi-Fi, house rules and directions — all in one place.
welcome.heading: - Welcome -
welcome.tagline: We prepared this guide to make your stay more comfortable and enjoyable.
card.checkin.title: Check-in / Check-out
card.checkin.desc: Check-in at 1:00 PM and check-out at 11:00 AM. Access is via the electronic lock and the code is provided in this guide.
card.wifi.title: Wi-Fi
card.wifi.desc: High-speed internet available throughout the property. Network name and password are below.
card.parking.title: Parking
card.parking.desc: There is no private garage spot. Vehicles may be parked in front of the property in the public area.
card.support.title: Support
card.support.desc: If you need help, the host responds quickly. Everything you need is gathered in this guide.
photos.subtitle: Explore our space
video.subtitle: Entry tutorial
video.title: How to enter the property
video.placeholder.title: Video tutorial
video.placeholder.desc: Coming soon. Check the step-by-step access instructions below.
access.title: Check-in & Access
access.key_location: Where to pick up the key
access.default_instruction: Enter the code above on the electronic lock and wait for the beep to unlock.
wifi.title: Wi-Fi & Support
wifi.qr_placeholder: Replace with your QR code image (see HTML comment)
wifi.contact_desc: Contact the host whenever you need help. Response is usually quick and support is available from check-in to check-out.
rules.title: House Rules
rules.general.title: General & Safety
rules.general.item1: • Lock doors and windows when leaving.
rules.general.item2: • Turn off the air conditioning and lights when not at home.
rules.trash.title: Trash & Organization
rules.trash.item1: • At the end of your stay, please take out the kitchen and bathroom trash.
rules.trash.item2: • Before leaving, check doors, windows, lights and A/C to leave everything organized for the next guest.
rules.trash.item3: • Thank you for your cooperation and for taking care of the space.
amenities.title: Amenities & Extras
amenities.desc1: The property offers a fully equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, bed linen, towels, hair dryer, bathroom essentials and TV.
amenities.desc2: If you need anything extra, the host can guide you on available items and how to use each space comfortably.
feedback.title: Feedback & Review
feedback.desc1: After your stay, your review helps maintain the standard of hospitality and improves the experience for future guests.
feedback.desc2: If something didn't go as expected, the best approach is to let the host know immediately so the situation can be resolved during your stay.
directions.title: Directions & Location
clima.subtitle: What will the weather be like?
explore.title: Explore the Area
